close_reason: Fixed in commit 4267485f9: all ticketed compiler2 type-infer convergence failures now pass; remaining compiler2:: sweep failures are separate source/macro tickets.
description: The wider cargo test --lib compiler2:: sweep still has port_type_infer failures unrelated to the raw IR provider-boundary migration: enum_reduce_range_settles_to_int and mixed_enum_take_calls_preserve_list_and_range_activations remain unresolved at MaterializeRoot(RootId(0)); corpus_folds_settle_myreduce_to_int_fold_state_machine, enum_reduce_named_ref_ok_settles_to_int, and fixpoint_leaves_no_reached_fn_unknown_fold_state_machine fatal during IndexCode. Investigate with telemetry and fix the semantic/source/type-infer convergence path without reintroducing old-world planner shims.

comments.text: Burn-down result: fixed all five ticketed compiler2 type-infer sweep failures. Individual green tests: enum_reduce_range_settles_to_int; mixed_enum_take_calls_preserve_list_and_range_activations; corpus_folds_settle_myreduce_to_int_fold_state_machine; enum_reduce_named_ref_ok_settles_to_int; fixpoint_leaves_no_reached_fn_unknown_fold_state_machine. Wider single-thread cargo test --lib compiler2:: now reports 657 passed, 5 failed, 5 ignored; remaining failures are the prior source/macro cases: cross_module_macro_qualifies_names_against_home_module, multiple_test_blocks_compile, test_macro_failing_assert_compiles, test_macro_passing_assert_compiles, whitespace_assignment_parses_and_binds. Verification also passed cargo check --lib, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test --lib --no-run.

title: Compiler2 type-infer sweep: recover Enum.reduce range/named-ref/fold-state-machine convergence
